rationale.fidelity: Preserves ex ante commitment, two messages, Bayes plausibility, posterior-driven receiver action, and transaction count as the sole objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the intermediary's policy choice, sequence, mechanism, feasibility trade-off, and alternative policies decision-relevant and concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is requested or asserted, so no unsupported literature claim is introduced.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly marks receiver threshold behavior as an assumption and carefully excludes accuracy, surplus, and welfare conclusions.
rationale.prose_clarity: Readable and precise, but substantially repetitive across narrative, DFC, gates, mapping, claims, and boundaries.
rationale.overall: Substantively complete and trap-safe; verbosity is the only material weakness.
